definition: The PBOC administered exchange rate regime stores 5-12% of adjustment energy through daily fixing divergence (500-1500 pips), 20% forward reserve requirement, and state bank intervention ($5-15B/month). Effective liquid reserves are ~$2.0-2.2T versus $3.2T reported (~$1T illiquid). The 2015 precedent showed a 3% administered devaluation triggered ~$1T in capital outflows.
evidence: Daily fixing divergence 500-1500 pips from market-implied levels
Asian EM pass-through of 40-60% of any CNY move
open_questions: At what point does stored adjustment energy become destabilizing?
What triggers PBOC to allow larger adjustment?
How would a disorderly CNY depreciation transmit through Asian EM?
